title: Onosma johnstonii
intro: Onosma johnstonii, also known as Johnston's Onosma, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Boraginaceae, native to tropical regions of Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, which can help in treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of Onosma johnstonii include alkaloids, glycosides, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its therapeutic effects. In traditional medicine, the plant is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is also used to make herbal teas, tinctures, and ointments.
